## Public-repository hygiene

- [ ] No real profile, session, transcript, source, local path, or credential is included.
- [ ] New workspace-managed assets are registered in the manifest, and all
      shipped files are present in the package inventory.
- [ ] Documentation and migration notes are updated.
- [ ] `npm test` passes.
